description: An essential item in your outfit, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal trousers, formal shoes and crisp full-sleeved shirts. Length: 95 cmMade of textured leatheretteTang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
